data.title: Buffalo Biodiesel completes compliance milestones with approval of Secondary Containment Retrofit Plan and Overfill Prevention Work Plan in Buffalo, NY - Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: Buffalo Biodiesel Inc., a prominent recycler and renewable-feedstock company based in Buffalo, New York, announced that their Secondary Containment Retrofit Plan and Overfill Prevention Work Plan have been accepted and approved on December 11, 2025. The company specializes in purchasing and collecting used cooking oil (UCO) as part of its vertically integrated business model. This approval marks a significant step for the company, showcasing its commitment to environmental safety and compliance.

data.title: Global market for Smart Washing Machines valued at $18.8B in 2024, projected to reach $64.2B by 2030 with 22.7% CAGR.
data.description: A report titled "Smart Washing Machines - Global Strategic Business Report" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Smart Washing Machines was worth US$18.8 billion in 2024, with a projected increase to US$64.2 billion by 2030, showcasing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.7% from 2024 to 2030. This comprehensive report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts to support informed business decisions. The surge in the Smart Washing Machine market is evident from these numbers.

data.title: SecureTech is expanding AI UltraProd in the U.S. through ADU market, aiming at rapid growth.
data.description: SecureTech has solidified its strategic approach in the U.S. by establishing a "beachhead" for its AI-powered construction subsidiary. The focus is on the flourishing Accessory Dwelling Unit sector, along with upcoming flagship projects. This move is a part of the company's plan to capitalize on the sector's growth.

data.title: Mondelēz International declares $0.50 dividend per share. Payable on Jan 14, 2026, to shareholders of record as of Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Chicago on December 11, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per Class A common stock share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on January 14, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Pyxus (OTCID: PYYX) publishes Fiscal Year 2025 Sustainability Report focusing on measurable impacts of its initiatives.
data.description: Today, in Morrisville, North Carolina, Pyxus International, Inc. (OTCID: PYYX) released its Fiscal Year 2025 Sustainability Report. This report outlines the quantifiable effects of the company's sustainability efforts. Pyxus International is a worldwide value-added agricultural business.

data.title: Semos.ai launches Enterprise Pilot Program for Manager Agents platform, enhancing HR systems with AI.
data.description: A recently introduced option allows big companies to improve their current HR and collaboration platforms by incorporating a smart AI component. Based in Lewisville, Texas, on December 11, 2025, Semos.ai unveiled its Enterprise Pilot Program for Manager Agents.

data.title: ADGM partners with GCFC, Hanwha, and EU GCC to drive sustainability with capital, policy, innovation at Abu Dhabi event.
data.description: The 8th edition of the Abu Dhabi Sustainable event was held in partnership with ADGM, the financial center of Abu Dhabi, and GCFC, Hanwha, and EU GCC Cooperation on green transition project. The event took place in Abu Dhabi, UAE, on December 11, 2025. This initiative aimed to promote sustainability and finance for climate projects.

data.title: ComEd expands Wilton Center substation to enable wind and solar projects - largest cluster in Illinois. Needed for 765 kV grid. CEO calls it a major milestone.
data.description: ComEd has revealed the completion of an expansion project for its 765 kV Wilton Center substation in Southern Will County. This upgrade is vital for facilitating the connection of a significant number of utility-scale onshore wind and solar projects to the ComEd grid and PJM energy market by 2026. ComEd's President and CEO, Gil Quiniones, emphasized the importance of this milestone, which will support the integration of renewable energy sources into the grid effectively.

data.title: MCS sells Mortgage Contracting Services to Stewart, closing the deal following agreement in November 2025.
data.description: In Lewisville, Texas, MCS has finalized the sale of its mortgage services division, Mortgage Contracting Services, to Stewart Information Services Corp. This business line encompasses property preservation services, property inspections, and various asset management and maintenance services. The agreement for the sale was made in November 2025, and the transaction has been successfully completed. Stewart is a renowned global title and real estate services company.

data.title: New "Tough Sexy" boots for women debut in Reba by Justin® Collection, reflecting Reba McEntire's style. Available online.
data.description: Introducing the newest collection of cowgirl boots from Justin Boots inspired by Reba McEntire's distinctive style and attitude. The Reba by Justin® line showcases unparalleled craftsmanship and is now on sale online. This bold new collection is based in Fort Worth, Texas and was unveiled on December 11, 2025. Fans can now purchase these stylish boots to channel their inner cowgirl.

data.title: No-IP, owned by Indus Growth Fund, makes majority investment in No-IP, a leading DNS provider. New CEO appointed.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Reno, Nevada, No-IP Technologies, LLC, a subsidiary of Indus Growth Fund, revealed its recent majority investment in Vitalwerks Internet Solutions, LLC, known as No-IP. This investment marks a significant development for No-IP, a prominent player in Dynamic DNS services on a global scale.
